title: Mechanism Design & Game Theory: Auctions, Incentives & Δd Types

valuation.why: Real number, drawn from known distribution = EML-0 object

bid_function.why: In symmetric BNE: β(v) = v - ∫₀^v F^{n-1}(t)dt / F^{n-1}(v) = exp-type

expected_revenue.expression: R = E[max bid] = n∫₀^1 v F^{n-1}(v) f(v) dv

revenue_equivalence.statement: All efficient auctions yield same expected revenue
revenue_equivalence.why: Equivalence proved via envelope theorem: ∂/∂v E[revenue] = EML-2 calculation
revenue_equivalence.type: TYPE 1 Δd=0: revenue equivalence = EML-2 self-map

virtual_value.why: Involves ratio of CDF and density = log-integral = EML-2

optimal_mechanism.rule: Allocate to argmax ψ(v_i); charge virtual value threshold

existence_of_optimal.why: General existence via fixed point (Kakutani) = EML-∞ non-constructive
existence_of_optimal.type: TYPE 2 Horizon: existence is EML-∞; construction is EML-2

auctions.key_insight: Auction computations = EML-2; optimal mechanism existence = EML-∞ (Horizon)

vcg_transfer.why: Sum over others' values, welfare-maximizing = EML-2 expectation

truthfulness_proof.why: Algebraic verification: dominant strategy = EML-0 algebraic argument

efficiency_vs_revenue.vcg: EML-2 transfers; EML-0 allocation; EML-0 truthfulness
efficiency_vs_revenue.tension: EML-0 efficiency (VCG) vs EML-2 revenue (Myerson) = fundamental tradeoff

mixed_strategy.description: Probability distribution σ_i ∈ Δ(A_i) over actions
mixed_strategy.why: Probability measure = EML-2 (integration over action space)

nash_existence.proof: Kakutani: best-response correspondence has fixed point
nash_existence.type: TYPE 2 Horizon: existence non-constructive (no efficient algorithm in general)

correlated_equilibrium.note: CE is EML-2; NE is EML-∞ — CE is computationally easier by one level

price_of_anarchy.why: Ratio of EML-0 optimum to EML-2 equilibrium welfare = EML-2

arrow_conditions.description: Unanimity, IIA, non-dictatorship: algebraic conditions on orderings

impossibility_result.type: TYPE 2 Horizon: the satisfying function does NOT exist
impossibility_result.insight: Arrow: EML-∞ impossibility proved via EML-0 logical argument

gibbard_satterthwaite.statement: Every strategy-proof social choice function is dictatorial
gibbard_satterthwaite.type: TYPE 2 Horizon: no non-dictatorial strategy-proof rule = EML-∞ impossibility

key_theorem: The Game-Theoretic Depth Catalog (S242): EML-0: pure strategies, valuation integers, social welfare sums, Arrow conditions. EML-2: mixed strategies (probability measures), expected revenue, VCG transfers, correlated equilibria, price of anarchy, Myerson virtual values. EML-∞: Nash equilibrium existence (Kakutani), Arrow impossibility, Gibbard-Satterthwaite, optimal mechanism existence. Pattern: COMPUTATIONS are EML-2; EXISTENCE is EML-∞ (TYPE 2 Horizon). The game-theoretic EML-∞ objects are all impossibility/existence results — they are provable but non-constructive. This is the standard Horizon pattern: EML-∞ via undecidability/non-constructive argument, not singularity. Correlated equilibrium is computationally easier than Nash equilibrium: CE=EML-2 (linear programming) vs NE=EML-∞ (fixed point) — one depth level difference.
rabbit_hole_log: Computations=EML-2, Existence=EML-∞: the universal game-theory pattern
CE=EML-2 vs NE=EML-∞: correlated equilibrium is one depth easier than Nash
Arrow impossibility = EML-∞ proved by EML-0 logical argument: impossibility = Horizon
VCG: EML-0 allocation + EML-2 transfers = efficiency-revenue tradeoff
